channel.title: Metal AM Insights on Gold 3D Print
channel.description: Recent content in Metal AM Insights on Gold 3D Print

item.title: Precious Metal 3D Printing: Gold, Platinum, and Silver SLM Production
item.description: Selective laser melting of precious metals enables geometry impossible in lost-wax casting. This guide covers alloy compositions, process parameters, and design guidelines for gold and platinum printing.
